'''Blim Shahar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] who fought against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], he was stationed aboard [[AX-456]] when his [[Birthday/Legends|birthday]] was coming up. He was then killed during the [[Battle of AX-456|attack]].

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
